title: CoSER
description: Hidden CoSER fan-out proxy with optional eval-model judging; still kept out of the runnable lane until the full GCA runtime exists.
baseline_summary: A baseline literary dialogue solver that repeats the most recent line while the hidden proxy now supports optional eval-model judging.

objective_spec.summary_template: Higher CoSER score is better across the hidden literary-dialogue fan-out proxy.

prompt_context: Edit editable.py only. The entry symbol solve(question: dict) must return the next character turn for the current CoSER literary dialogue item. If eval_model is provided, the hidden proxy also judges literary character fidelity and scene grounding.
